message:
Add mounted-path ext4 + btrfs symlink PATH_MAX boundary coverage

Freezes the ffs-core public symlink contract through FUSE: target at
exactly LINUX_PATH_MAX succeeds, empty or >PATH_MAX targets are rejected
with ENAMETOOLONG, and rejected attempts leave no directory entry.
Covers bd-x4o7o (ext4) and bd-gqvss (btrfs) via a shared assertion
helper invoked from with_rw_mount and with_btrfs_rw_mount.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
